title: Counter-Intelligence
description: Counter-intelligence raises detection risk for spies and adds red herrings to intercepted intel. Competitors may invest in counter-intel, making espionage harder and results less reliable.
definition-of-done: Counter-intel investment option for all players. Counter-intel increases spy detection chance. Red herring intel can be generated. Counter-intel strength visible to owner only.
testing-plan: Verify counter-intel investment works. Test increased detection chance. Verify red herrings generate. Test visibility restrictions.
